calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2022 Off Calendar

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar May-09-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. SHERYL K. GARKO, Esq. of Orrick, Herrington & Sutcliffe LLP as proposed counsel pro hac vice for plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF DUETTO RESEARCH, INC.'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed Ms. Garko to appear to address any recent California pro hac vice applications.

Ms. Garko indicates she has not applied to be counsel pro hac vice in California within the last two years.

The Court rules as follows: Plaintiff's motion to admit counsel pro hac vice is granted.

Counsel to prepapre and submit a proposed order to the Court for review/signature.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Permitting The Sealing Of Documents And Information; **Court Reporter Fees Paid**
Off Calendar Apr-22-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DUETTO RESEARCH, INC.'S Motion For An Order Permitting The Sealing Of Documents And Information is granted.

The court will review the proposed order submitted by prevailing party.

Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/SRB)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction And Expedited Discovery
Off Calendar Apr-01-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Catherine Lui, Esq. (415.773.5571; clui@orrick.com) of Orrick for Plaintiff.
Ethan Jacobs, Esq. (ethan@ejacobslaw.com) for Defendant.

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF DUETTO RESEARCH, INC., A CORPORATION'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction And Expedited Discovery.

The Court signs the stipulation and order granting plaintiff's motion for preliminary injunction and expedited discovery.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
